title: Riptide trident - High contrast
description: changes every trident with the riptide enchantment to a red-orange-ish version
body:
Vanilla, no mods needed

Changes the staff part of every with riptide(any level) enchanted trident to a red-orange-ish color both in the inventory and in the players hand (first and third person)

dark prismarine (more vanilla looking) version here: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/riptide-trident

Feel free to contact me for other color/model ideas
